experienceQuestions.question: Led recruitment campaigns reducing candidate acquisition cost metrics?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Scaled talent sourcing pipelines, hiring 45+ technical and operations candidates, reducing overall cost-per-hire by 22%.

experienceQuestions.question: Revamped onboarding programs to lower new-hire ramp times?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Designed an automated HRIS onboarding protocol, lowering new hire average ramp-up time from 3 weeks to 1.5 weeks.

experienceQuestions.question: Implemented talent recognition setups to drop corporate turnover?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Launched employee-centric recognition programs, lowering corporate annual employee turnover metrics by 18%.

experienceQuestions.question: Optimized applicant tracking systems to speed candidate screenings?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Configured custom workflows in Greenhouse ATS, decreasing candidate screening turnaround lag times by 35%.

experienceQuestions.question: Audited HR policy codes to verify statutory labor laws?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Drafted internal workplace safety codes and employee manuals, ensuring 100% compliance with local employment standards laws.

experienceQuestions.question: Grew organic employer inbound application counts via branding?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Hosted university hiring events and launched employer video campaigns, boosting organic monthly applications by 50%.

projectQuestions.question: Structured a recruitment campaign or referral drive project?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Designed and launched an employee referral campaign program, expanding candidate pipeline volumes by 35%.

projectQuestions.question: Configured pipeline stages or scorecards in Greenhouse ATS?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Structured custom applicant milestones and interviewer scorecards inside Greenhouse ATS, standardizing reviews.

projectQuestions.question: Drafted training checklists or digital manuals for onboarding?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Compiled comprehensive digital checklists and onboarding files, ensuring clear steps for new hires.

projectQuestions.question: Built tracking spreadsheets to trace time-to-hire logs?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Created candidate status tracking templates in Excel, logging metrics to highlight pipeline bottlenecks.

projectQuestions.question: Ran employee feedback pulse surveys in Typeform or CultureAmp?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Structured and deployed company-wide quarterly pulse surveys, gathering metric records from 150+ staff.

projectQuestions.question: Developed training decks or compliance slides for employees?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Authored interactive training slide modules covering company ethics, automating workforce compliance tutorials.
